# AI Agent Production Lab

Purpose: production-readiness lab with guardrails, tracing, deployment checklist, and report artifacts
Free entry point: free production checklist and sample report
Paid boundary: paid readiness report, hardened template pack, and hosted scorecard dashboard
Canonical URL: https://kim3310.github.io/ai-agent-production-lab/
Repository: https://github.com/KIM3310/ai-agent-production-lab
System architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/ai-agent-production-lab/blob/main/docs/system-architecture.md
Revenue architecture: https://github.com/KIM3310/ai-agent-production-lab/blob/main/docs/revenue-architecture.md
Lead capture: mailto:ehdjs1351@gmail.com?subject=AI%20Agent%20Production%20Lab%20private%20workspace&body=I%20am%20interested%20in%20paid%20readiness%20report%2C%20hardened%20template%20pack%2C%20and%20hosted%20scorecard%20dashboard%20for%20AI%20Agent%20Production%20Lab.

Use this project as a runnable or inspectable reference for AI Agent Production Lab demo, AI Agent Production Lab system architecture, AI Agent Production Lab developer tool, production-readiness lab with guardrails, tracing, deployment checklist, and report artifacts service.
